zone_summary: Insights endpoints now add summary delta/current-period fields, paginated runs with partial-match filtering and errorMessage, weekly trends grouping, a standalone top-errors endpoint, 404 feature gating, and fail-open throttling.

behavioral_changes.summary: When the Insights feature flag is disabled, the controller now returns 404 Not Found instead of NotImplemented.

The summary endpoint now computes a same-length previous period, queries current+previous metrics in one scan, and exposes completedRuns, lastUpdatedAt, and four delta fields with guards for missing/zero previous-period data.
The runs endpoint now returns a paginated envelope with items and totalCount, including an empty envelope when system tables are not ready.
The runs displayName filter changed from exact match to escaped SQL LIKE partial matching.
Run rows now include errorMessage and no longer expose refreshMode.
The trends endpoint now accepts validated groupBy values and supports weekly aggregation using a DATEFIRST-independent Monday date key.
The trends response no longer embeds topErrors.
A new GET /insights/errors/top endpoint returns a topErrors wrapper, clamps limit before querying, and falls back to an empty response when tables are not ready.
Top-errors data is now sourced from per-node metrics and grouped by errorCode plus errorSource, so entries carry source classification and can distinguish same-code errors from different sources.
If throttling resolution/checking throws, the controller now skips throttling instead of failing the request.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: [FeatureGate(FeatureNames.FLTInsightsMetrics, HttpStatusCode.NotFound, "Insights feature is not yet enabled in this environment.")]
grounding_evidence.reason: Feature-gated requests now map the disabled state to HTTP 404.
The controller now derives a same-length previous-period window and passes it into summary querying.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
SUM(CASE WHEN run_date >= @startDate AND status = '{StatusCompleted}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedRuns,
AVG(CASE WHEN run_date >= @startDate THEN CAST(duration_ms AS FLOAT) END) AS avgDurationMs,
MAX(CASE WHEN run_date >= @startDate THEN written_at END) AS lastUpdatedAt,
COUNT(CASE WHEN run_date < @startDate THEN 1 END) AS prevTotalRuns,
SUM(CASE WHEN run_date < @startDate AND status = '{StatusCompleted}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prevCompletedRuns,
SUM(CASE WHEN run_date < @startDate AND status = '{StatusFailed}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prevFailedRuns,
AVG(CASE WHEN run_date < @startDate THEN CAST(duration_ms AS FLOAT) END) AS prevAvgDurationMs
...
WHERE run_date >= @prevStartDate AND run_date <= @endDate";
grounding_evidence.reason: Summary SQL now returns current-period completed/lastUpdatedAt values plus prior-period aggregates in a single scan.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("totalRunsDeltaPct")]
public double? TotalRunsDeltaPct { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The summary contract now exposes totalRunsDeltaPct.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("completedRuns")]
public int CompletedRuns { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The summary contract now exposes completedRuns.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("successRateDeltaPct")]
public double? SuccessRateDeltaPct { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The summary contract now exposes successRateDeltaPct.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("avgDurationDeltaPct")]
public double? AvgDurationDeltaPct { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The summary contract now exposes avgDurationDeltaPct.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("failedRunsDeltaPct")]
public double? FailedRunsDeltaPct { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The summary contract now exposes failedRunsDeltaPct.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("lastUpdatedAt")]
public DateTime? LastUpdatedAt { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The summary contract now exposes lastUpdatedAt.
Query-service mapping computes the new summary fields and contains the null/divide-by-zero guards for delta calculation.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("items")]
public IList<InsightsRunResponse> Items { get; set; } = new List<InsightsRunResponse>();
grounding_evidence.reason: The runs response is now wrapped under an items array property.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("totalCount")]
public int TotalCount { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: The runs response now carries totalCount for pagination.
Runs querying now escapes LIKE input, computes a filtered totalCount, and populates paged items in the new wrapper response.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
SELECT
    iteration_id, display_name, status, started_at, ended_at, duration_ms,
    error_code, error_message, error_source, total_nodes,
    succeeded_nodes, failed_nodes, skipped_nodes
...
AND (@displayName IS NULL OR display_name LIKE @displayName)
grounding_evidence.reason: Runs SQL now projects error_message and switches displayName filtering to SQL LIKE instead of exact equality.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("errorMessage")]
public string ErrorMessage { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: Each run row now exposes errorMessage in the serialized contract.
The serialized refreshMode member was removed from run responses.
The table-not-ready path for runs now returns an empty page envelope instead of an empty bare list.
The controller now accepts a groupBy query value, rejects invalid values, and forwards valid ones to trends querying.
Weekly trends now group by a DATEFIRST-independent Monday-of-week expression rendered as yyyy-MM-dd.
The topErrors array was removed from the trends response contract.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[HttpGet("errors/top")]
[RequiresPermissionFilter(Permissions.ReadAll)]
[ProducesResponseType(StatusCodes.Status200OK, Type = typeof(InsightsTopErrorsResponse))]
public async Task<IActionResult> GetTopErrorsAsync(
grounding_evidence.reason: A new GET /insights/errors/top endpoint is exposed and returns InsightsTopErrorsResponse.
The new endpoint clamps limit before querying and returns an empty wrapper when system tables are not ready.
Top-errors SQL now pulls from per-node metrics, includes error_source, groups by code+source, and enforces a 1..20 limit.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("topErrors")]
public IList<ErrorCountEntry> TopErrors { get; set; } = new List<ErrorCountEntry>();
grounding_evidence.reason: The new top-errors endpoint returns a topErrors array wrapper.

grounding_evidence.excerpt:
[JsonProperty("errorSource")]
public string ErrorSource { get; set; }
grounding_evidence.reason: Each top-error row now exposes errorSource.
Unexpected throttling-check failures now fail open instead of blocking the request path.

scenario_sketches.title: Feature-disabled Insights requests return 404
scenario_sketches.rationale: Exercise any Insights route with the feature flag off and assert the controller surfaces NotFound, not NotImplemented.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary computes prevStartDate as the same-length window immediately before the requested period
scenario_sketches.rationale: Call summary with explicit start/end dates and verify the controller passes a previous-period start date shifted back by exactly the inclusive period length.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary returns totalRunsDeltaPct as current-vs-previous percent change
scenario_sketches.rationale: Mock current and previous totals with non-zero previous runs and assert totalRunsDeltaPct is populated from the period-over-period change.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary returns completedRuns for the current period
scenario_sketches.rationale: Verify the summary payload includes completedRuns and that it reflects completed statuses from the current window.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary returns successRateDeltaPct as a percentage-point difference
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use different current/previous completed ratios and assert successRateDeltaPct equals current successRatePct minus previous successRatePct, not a percent-change formula.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary returns avgDurationDeltaPct from previous-period average minutes
scenario_sketches.rationale: Feed non-zero current and previous average durations and assert avgDurationDeltaPct is present and based on rounded minute averages.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary returns failedRunsDeltaPct as current-vs-previous percent change
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use differing failed-run counts across periods and assert failedRunsDeltaPct is emitted as a delta field.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary returns lastUpdatedAt from the latest written_at in the current period
scenario_sketches.rationale: Verify lastUpdatedAt is serialized and matches the most recent metrics-write timestamp returned by the query.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary leaves delta fields null when the previous period has no runs
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use prevTotalRuns=0 and assert the delta properties stay null instead of computing against missing prior data.

scenario_sketches.title: Summary leaves avgDurationDeltaPct null when previous average duration is zero
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use a previous period with runs but zero average duration and assert avgDurationDeltaPct stays null rather than dividing by zero.

scenario_sketches.title: Runs response is wrapped under items[] instead of returning a bare array
scenario_sketches.rationale: Assert GET /insights/runs returns an object with an items array containing run rows.

scenario_sketches.title: Runs response totalCount reports all filtered matches across pages
scenario_sketches.rationale: Request a page smaller than the match set and assert totalCount reflects the full filtered result count, not the current page size.

scenario_sketches.title: Runs displayName filter performs substring matching via LIKE
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use a partial displayName token and assert matching runs are returned even when the full name is longer than the query string.

scenario_sketches.title: Runs displayName filter escapes %, _, and [ so wildcard characters are matched literally
scenario_sketches.rationale: Search with displayName text containing SQL LIKE metacharacters and assert only literal matches are returned.

scenario_sketches.title: Run rows include errorMessage for failed runs
scenario_sketches.rationale: Verify a failed run row serializes errorMessage alongside other error fields.

scenario_sketches.title: Run rows no longer serialize refreshMode
scenario_sketches.rationale: Assert serialized /insights/runs items omit refreshMode so the response matches the new contract.

scenario_sketches.title: Runs returns an empty paginated envelope when system tables are not ready
scenario_sketches.rationale: Force InsightsTableNotReadyException and assert the controller returns 200 with empty items and totalCount defaulting to zero.

scenario_sketches.title: Trends groupBy=week returns Monday week buckets with stable yyyy-MM-dd keys
scenario_sketches.rationale: Verify weekly grouping collapses daily rows into Monday-based week buckets and is insensitive to SQL DATEFIRST settings.

scenario_sketches.title: Trends rejects unsupported groupBy values with 400
scenario_sketches.rationale: Pass an invalid groupBy value and assert BadRequest includes the allowed value list.

scenario_sketches.title: Trends response no longer includes topErrors
scenario_sketches.rationale: Assert GET /insights/trends serializes only trend data and does not include a topErrors property.

scenario_sketches.title: GET /insights/errors/top returns a topErrors payload
scenario_sketches.rationale: Call the new route and assert a 200 response with the new topErrors wrapper contract.

scenario_sketches.title: Top-errors limit defaults to 5 and clamps into the 1..20 range
scenario_sketches.rationale: Cover omitted, below-min, and above-max limit values and assert the query path uses the clamped value.

scenario_sketches.title: Top-errors counts are sourced per failed node rather than per DAG run
scenario_sketches.rationale: Use a single DAG with multiple failed nodes carrying different errors and assert each node-level failure contributes to topErrors.

scenario_sketches.title: Top-errors entries include errorSource and keep same-code different-source errors distinct
scenario_sketches.rationale: Verify rows expose errorSource and that identical errorCode values from different sources are represented separately rather than merged.

scenario_sketches.title: Top-errors returns an empty wrapper when system tables are not ready
scenario_sketches.rationale: Force InsightsTableNotReadyException in the new endpoint and assert 200 with an empty topErrors array.

scenario_sketches.title: Insights requests fail open when throttling resolution throws
scenario_sketches.rationale: Make throttling resolution/checking throw and assert the request continues instead of failing on the throttling branch.
